item.title: Hyperplane
item.description: Architecture Overview Hyperplane is a platform that powers networking services like Network Load Balancer (NLB), NAT gateway (NATGW), PrivateLink, Gateway Load Balancer (GWLB), ...

item.title: VPC
item.description: Addressing and Routing Physical addresses are separate from VPC addresses, to enable independent scaling of the virtual network and the physical network ...

item.title: AWS Map
item.description: Networking The AWS Backbone Network connects AWS Regions, Availability Zones, and the Internet. VPC is a SDN built for AWS powering isolated virtual networks.

item.title: Network Load Balancer
item.description: Overview Network Load Balancer (NLB) is a L4 load balancer built on Hyperplane that is more elastic than other ELB products from AWS. Client IP preservation Unlike a typical load balancer that terminates incoming connections and initiates outbound connections to targets, Hyperplane operates in a transparent mode and the target resource sees IP information about the client directly from the packets received.

item.title: Download macOS installer
item.description: Download recent releases softwareupdate --fetch-full-installer --full-installer-version 10.15 Version can be taken from the list below. $ softwareupdate --list-full-installers Finding available software Software Update found the following full installers: * Title: macOS Sonoma, Version: 14.5, Size: 13353373KiB, Build: 23F79, Deferred: NO * Title: macOS Sonoma, Version: 14.4.1, Size: 13298513KiB, Build: 23E224, Deferred: NO * Title: macOS Sonoma, Version: 14.4, Size: 13297753KiB, Build: 23E214, Deferred: NO * Title: macOS Sonoma, Version: 14.3.1, Size: 13073278KiB, Build: 23D60, Deferred: NO * Title: macOS Ventura, Version: 13.6.7, Size: 11924125KiB, Build: 22G720, Deferred: NO * Title: macOS Ventura, Version: 13.6.6, Size: 11917983KiB, Build: 22G630, Deferred: NO * Title: macOS Ventura, Version: 13.6.5, Size: 11916934KiB, Build: 22G621, Deferred: NO * Title: macOS Ventura, Version: 13.6.4, Size: 11912664KiB, Build: 22G513, Deferred: NO * Title: macOS Monterey, Version: 12.7.5, Size: 12116686KiB, Build: 21H1222, Deferred: NO * Title: macOS Monterey, Version: 12.7.4, Size: 12117810KiB, Build: 21H1123, Deferred: NO * Title: macOS Monterey, Version: 12.7.3, Size: 12109975KiB, Build: 21H1015, Deferred: NO * Title: macOS Big Sur, Version: 11.7.10, Size: 12125478KiB, Build: 20G1427, Deferred: NO * Title: macOS Catalina, Version: 10.15.7, Size: 8055650KiB, Build: 19H15, Deferred: NO * Title: macOS Catalina, Version: 10.15.7, Size: 8055522KiB, Build: 19H2, Deferred: NO * Title: macOS Catalina, Version: 10.15.6, Size: 8055450KiB, Build: 19G2021, Deferred: NO.

item.title: Read a block of text into a variable
item.description: read -r -d '' VAR1 << EOV lorum ipsum EOV To prevent expansions, quote EOV into 'EOV'.

item.title: snmpwalk
item.description: Return Everything .1 represents top of the OID tree. snmpwalk -v2c -cpublic <IP> .1 If name are not displayed properly, you could try adding -mALL to the command arguments.

item.title: Systemd Service Hardening
item.description: Create the user with $HOME at /run/<username> and configure RuntimeDirectory, so that systemd will create and chown the directory automatically.

item.title: Beancount and Fava
item.description: Fava Tips fava --read-only is supposedly less vulnerable to arbitrary file write, which is a feature of Fava (not a bug). Only accounts opened with fava-uptodate-indication: TRUE metadata are supposed to have up-to-date balance tracking (i.e.
